rationales.hook_strength: '20 minutes behind' is specific and counter-intuitive enough to earn a pause, though it lacks a sharper emotional stake (hunger, overeating guilt) that would make it unmissable.
rationales.clarity: Each slide advances a single mechanical step — delay → hormones → trap → fix → payoff — with no detours or jargon overload.
rationales.audience_fit: The busy 25-year-old who eats lunch in 8 minutes at their desk will recognize themselves immediately; 'no willpower required' is exactly the frame they need.
rationales.novelty: The 20-minute rule is one of the most repeated nutrition facts on TikTok — the hormone framing (ghrelin/GLP-1) adds a thin layer but won't feel fresh to a health-curious feed.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged ('roughly', 'naturally'), voice is plain and direct, CTA ties cleanly to meal snapping and the Health Score without AI-cringe or hype words.
rationales.predicted_performance: Strong saves potential from the actionable hook, but the well-worn topic will suppress shares and algorithmic push unless a novel visual angle compensates on the cover.
